The platform configuration for jobs that are running on Fargate resources. Jobs that run on EC2 resources must not specify this parameter.

batch.jobdefinition.containerproperties..Description: The AWS Fargate platform version where the jobs are running. A platform version is specified only for jobs that are running on Fargate resources. If one isn't specified, the `LATEST` platform version is used by default. This uses a recent, approved version of the AWS Fargate platform for compute resources. For more information, see [AWS Fargate platform versions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECS/latest/developerguide/platform_versions.html) in the *Amazon Elastic Container Service Developer Guide*.
